subject: Re: D'Amour
body:
they had turned it down prior the the entire v.i. , now knows that development is impossible tell him you will soon make your offer public, 

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 4, 2007 7:07:20 AM
Subject: FW: D'Amour


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, July 03, 2007 10:44 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: D'Amour

Spoke with him as promised. Conveyed full message. He told me I was WAY
off and that they had turned down offer for $27mm. I told him I thought
dev plans highly unlikely and that I wanted to buy property and gift it
to the ppl of the usvi. I will call tomorrow with details.
